arts.ttl: 'It's a cracker' - Osula scores first Newcastle goal
arts.sum: William Osula scores a "rocket" as Newcastle take a 3-1 lead against Bromley in the FA Cup third round.

arts.ttl: 'Dream start!'- Bromley score after eight minutes against Newcastle
arts.sum: Watch League Two Bromley take a shock lead as Cameron Congreve scores within eight minutes against Newcastle United in the FA Cup at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe faces nightmare 21-day Newcastle United scenario - but there is a catch - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Things are going according to plan for Eddie Howe and Newcastle United so far this season. Liverpool, for example, have 10 games to play before they welcome Newcastle to Anfield, while the Magpies "only" have eight matches in that time.

arts.ttl: What Alan Shearer did straight after Newcastle's FA Cup draw speaks volumes
arts.sum: Newcastle United icon Alan Shearer couldn't hide his delight to discover that Eddie Howe's men will be going to League One club Birmingham City in the next round of the FA Cup . In the draw, Newcastle discovered they will be taking a trip to St. Andrew's to face League One team Birmingham City in the next round after they beat Lincoln City on Saturday.
